ALL SPEED/CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS ABOUT (+/- 0.5KNOT FOR SPEED AND +/- 5% FOR CONSUMPTION) ARE ALWAYS SUBJECT TO GOOD WEATHER WHICH IS DEFINED AS NO ADVERSE CURRENT A/O NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL A/O MODERATE SEA, WIND NOT EXCEEDING BEAUFORT FORCE 4 (FOUR) A/O DOUGLES SEA STATE 3 (THREE) WITH  SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT (1,25 MTRS). PERIODS OF WEATHER EXCEEDING THE ABOVE DESCRIBED GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS ARE TO BE EXPRESSELY EXCLUDED FROM THE EVALUATION OF VESSELS PERFORMANCE. NO EXTRAPOLATIONS TO BE MADE, FOR THE PURPOSES OF CALCULATING CHARTERERS’ LOSSES RESULTING FROM ANY UNDERPERFORMANCE, OVER ANY PERIODS DURING WHICH THE WEATHER/SEA CONDITIONS ARE OTHER THAN AS THOSE DESCRIBED ABOVE.
CHARTERERS TO SUPPLY FIRST CLASS QUALITY BUNKERS STRICTLY COMPLYING WITH ISO 8217-2010(E), ENABLING MAIN ENGINE AND GENERATOR ENGINES TO OPERATE WITHOUT ANY HARMFULL EFFECTS.
BUNKER SPECS :
IFO GRADE 380 CST RMG 380 ISO 8217- 2010(E)
MDO GRADE DMA/DMB ISO 8217 - 2010(E)
BUNKER TESTING TO BE ORGANIZED BY OWNERS/MANAGERS BUT COST ALWAYS TO BE FOR CHRTS ACCOUNT.
